vulnerabilities.title: SIP digest auth without rate limiting on REGISTER
vulnerabilities.exploit_path: Attacker brute-forces REGISTER passwords; pike limits IP but not per-username attempts
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add per-username rate limiting or account lockout after N failed attempts

vulnerabilities.title: RTP media not encrypted (no SRTP)
vulnerabilities.exploit_path: RTP streams on UDP 10000-20000 are plaintext; network-level eavesdropping possible
vulnerabilities.remediation: Enable SRTP in RTPengine and configure OpenSIPS to negotiate SRTP via SDP

vulnerabilities.title: MI HTTP interface without authentication
vulnerabilities.exploit_path: If MI HTTP port 8888 is exposed beyond internal networks, attacker can query/modify OpenSIPS state
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add HTTP basic auth or IP whitelist to mi_http; verify network isolation in compose

vulnerabilities.title: Hardcoded credentials in test files
vulnerabilities.exploit_path: Test fixtures may contain hardcoded passwords or tokens committed to repo
vulnerabilities.remediation: Audit test files for hardcoded secrets; use fixtures loaded from environment

vulnerabilities.title: No global rate limit across trunk endpoints
vulnerabilities.exploit_path: Attacker distributes INVITEs across many trunk endpoints to bypass per-trunk rate limits
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add global per-IP rate limit in addition to per-trunk limits

vulnerabilities.title: Sensitive data in logs without masking
vulnerabilities.exploit_path: SIP Authorization headers or P-Asserted-Identity may be logged to syslog/acc without masking
vulnerabilities.remediation: Verify acc module masks Authorization headers; configure log sanitization

vulnerabilities.title: Weak password storage (HA1 only, no PBKDF2)
vulnerabilities.exploit_path: HA1 hashes are fast to brute-force offline if DB is compromised
vulnerabilities.remediation: Consider additional password hardening or MFA for admin accounts; accept HA1 for SIP compatibility

vulnerabilities.title: Anomaly detector accuracy unverified
vulnerabilities.exploit_path: Without accuracy benchmarks, detector may miss attacks or generate excessive false positives
vulnerabilities.remediation: Establish accuracy benchmark with labeled dataset; define acceptable FP/FN rates
